01.

Architectural Engineering

Professional Summary

I am a motivated final-year B.Tech IT student at Rajkiya Engineering College, Bijnor (AKTU), with a cumulative CGPA of 6.5+, backed by hands-on engineering capabilities and two specialized internships.

My passion lies in full-stack architecture—bridging the gap between visually spectacular user interfaces and highly secure, time-series data structures.

From constructing role-based recyclers on EcoTrade with dual real-time interfaces, to implementing mathematical regressions and AR/VR systems, I strive for clean, modular algorithms.

Elite Skill Arsenal

Languages

C / C++ Java Python JavaScript SQL Visual Basic

Full-Stack Core

React.js Node.js Express.js REST APIs Vite HTML5/CSS3

Databases & Tools

MongoDB MySQL Firebase Git & GitHub VS Code Vercel Android Studio

AI/ML & Fundamentals

Machine Learning MATLAB AR/VR DSA OOP DBMS & OS Power BI
02.

Deployed Showcase

Major Project • Deployed Live

EcoTrade

A MERN marketplace recycling ecosystem connecting households with recycling plants to mitigate landfill waste. Designed separate dashboards with role-based accessibility, automated geolocation matchmaking using Google Maps API, and real-time status triggers via Firebase Realtime DB. Enabled continuous GitHub auto-deploys to Vercel.

React.js Node.js MongoDB Firebase Google Maps API
Travel Booking Engine

Explore Vista

Full-featured travel platform enabling users to plan and book travel itineraries in a single transaction. Built a multi-step planning flow consolidating APIs from multiple systems. Integrated 3+ third-party REST APIs for live availability data using async/await error handling.

HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript REST APIs
Competitive Practice

Algorithm Lab

Consistent DSA problem-solving and algorithmic practice across Arrays, Trees, Dynamic Programming, and Graphs. Regular participant in coding challenges and competitive platforms, training speed and complex analytical reasoning.

C++ / C Java Python LeetCode DSA
03.

Professional & Academic Timeline

Dec 2025

AR/VR Development Intern

Tamizhan Skills (NSDC & Skill India Certified)

Completed hands-on AR/VR development tasks and learning sessions in a structured remote internship program. Contributed to immersive applications and emerging technologies, certified by National Skill Development Corporation and Microsoft Certified Educator.

Sep 2025

AI & Machine Learning Intern

Kodacy (In association with SPACE & AICTE)

Completed a 30-day intensive virtual internship focused on AI and Machine Learning. Gained practical experience in training classification models, analyzing neural networks, and developing AI applications using Python and MATLAB.

Nov 2022 - Jul 2026

B.Tech — Information Technology

Rajkiya Engineering College, Bijnor (AKTU, Lucknow)

Focused on core computer science and engineering principles. Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming (Java), Database Management Systems, Operating Systems, Web Technologies, Image Processing, and Cyber Security. Cumulative CGPA: 6.5+.
